name: @singularity/plugin-debug-read-set-shrink
description: Read-set shrink monitor: files a deduped Debug → Reports signal when a boot-critical resource's persisted read-set sheds a dependency table, so a human can confirm it is a legitimate code-change shed rather than a data-dependent conditional query that didn't fire. Includes the read-set-shrink report-kind renderer and the enabled config.
